title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: MCMINNVILLE AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity for families to build and buy their own homes. The houses are sold at no profit to homeowner families. Houses are built with volunteer labor and use donated materials, when available. Mortgage payments received from homeowners are recycled into a fund to build more homes in the McMinnville area. This is a long term housing solution. 1040 SE 1st Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Families currently living in substandard housing who meet all of the following requirements: -Total annual income of 40%-65% of the Area Median Income (AMI) for Yamhill County -Can commit to 200-400 hours of sweat equity in construction and other partnership opportunities, working alongside volunteers -United States citizens or permanent residents with one year of residency or work in the service area -Have not had a bankruptcy in at least 4 years -A decent credit history and criminal background check. Emphasis is on most recent history and is evaluated based on individual circumstances (e.g., no minimum credit score). Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 472-9637 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 472-9637 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to be added to the contact list. Applications are only available during select times of the year, based on the availability of homes. Visit website for more information about program participation. This is a long-term housing solution requiring months, sometimes years. FEES: No application fee. 30% of gross income is used to make monthly house payments; interest-free mortgage. DOCUMENTS: At time of application: Minimum 2 months of utility bills, income/paystubs, etc. Original ID documents, latest income tax return, debts, legal, and other documents as needed. Visit website for more information. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Amity, Carlton, Lafayette, McMinnville, Sheridan, Willamina, Grande Ronde, and Yamhill Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RAMPS/RAILS/REPAIR PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MCMINNVILLE AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY
